prompt: Write 1 Show HN post for openpatent.ai. Title ≤80 chars, body 250-400 words. Must (a) explain the AI-idea-theft problem in one paragraph, (b) describe the 6-layer cryptographic disclosure stack (SHA-3/512, HMAC, Ed25519, Bitcoin OTS, C2PA, hash-chained audit), (c) mention the $10 starting tier, (d) list 3 concrete technical asks for feedback (latency on the OTS calendar fallback, schema design for the waitlist table, MCP tool design for the demo endpoint), (e) link the repo + API docs + waitlist. Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {title:string, body:string, signature:string}.
